overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a medieval RPG showing exploration of a dimly lit peasant house interior. Two armored guards stand by a fireplace while a woman tends to an injured person on a bed. The player character slowly moves around the room examining details including a back storage pantry.

scene_state.functional_zone: medieval peasant house main room with fireplace

agents.ego_description: standing in the room observing the scene by the fireplace

notable_agents.action: two guards in yellow gambesons and chainmail standing by the fireplace
woman in simple dress standing near the bed looking toward the guards

entered.detail: large stone fireplace with burning fire and cooking pot
simple wooden bed with injured person lying on straw mattress
faded decorative tapestry hanging on wooden wall
exposed wooden ceiling beams and thatch roofing
lit wall sconce with candle providing warm light

segments.scene_description: The scene opens in a dimly lit medieval cottage main room. Two armored guards stand near a stone fireplace while a woman stands by a wooden bed where an injured person lies. The room features wooden walls, exposed ceiling beams, and warm firelight.

events.description: camera moves toward the bed to examine the injured person more closely

agents.ego_description: approaching the bed to examine the injured person lying on the straw mattress

notable_agents.action: injured person lying on bed with visible wounds on legs, appearing unconscious
woman standing beside the bed looking down at the injured person

segments.scene_description: The camera moves closer to the wooden bed, focusing on the injured person lying on the straw mattress with visible wounds. The woman stands nearby looking down at the injured person. The stone floor and wooden walls of the cottage are visible in the warm candlelight.

events.description: camera moves back toward the center of the room away from the bed
the two armored guards turn to face the camera and ego character

agents.ego_description: moving back to the room center as the guards turn to face the player character

notable_agents.action: two armored guards with shields turning to face the player
woman walking away from the bed toward the back of the room

entered.detail: stone fireplace with burning fire visible again as camera returns

segments.scene_description: The camera retreats to the room center where the two guards now turn to face the player character. The woman walks away toward the back of the room. The warm firelight illuminates the guards' yellow gambesons and chainmail armor.

scene_state.functional_zone: back storage pantry with shelves and supplies

events.description: camera enters the back storage room with wooden shelves and barrels

agents.ego_description: entering the back storage room to examine the shelves and supplies

entered.detail: tall wooden shelves holding bread loaves and pottery
large wooden barrel with metal bands
several clay pots and bowls on a wooden table
wooden trapdoor or hatch set into the stone floor
angled thatch ceiling in the smaller back room

segments.scene_description: The camera enters a narrow back storage pantry with wooden shelves stocked with bread and pottery. A large barrel and clay pots sit on the floor and table. The room has a lower thatch ceiling and a wooden trapdoor in the stone floor.

scene_state.functional_zone: main room with fireplace and bed

events.description: camera exits storage room and returns to the main room
camera focuses on the woman walking away toward the back corner

agents.ego_description: returning to the main room and observing the guards and the woman walking away

notable_agents.action: woman walking away from camera toward the back corner of the room
two guards standing and facing the camera with shields ready

entered.detail: stone fireplace now visible from the opposite side of the room
wooden bed with injured person visible again from new angle
wooden door in the back wall of the main room

segments.scene_description: The camera returns to the main room, now viewing the fireplace from the opposite side. The two guards stand facing the player while the woman walks away toward the back corner. The wooden bed with the injured person is visible to the right, and a wooden door appears in the back wall.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a dimly lit medieval cottage that shifts from an intimate scene of care to a detailed exploration of the home's utility areas. It begins in the main room where warm firelight illuminates two armored guards by a stone fireplace and a woman tending to an injured person on a wooden bed. As the camera glides closer to the straw mattress to reveal the patient's wounds, it then retreats to the center of the room, prompting the guards in yellow gambesons to turn toward the viewer while the woman moves away. The perspective then shifts into a narrow back storage pantry, passing wooden shelves of bread and pottery before revealing a thatch ceiling and a trapdoor in the stone floor. Finally, the camera returns to the main room to view the fireplace from the opposite side, framing the guards and the distant wooden door as the woman disappears into the back corner.
